A '''Mon Calamari submersible''' a type of underwater craft that was a common way of getting around the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. [[Cilghal]] used one to transport [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] to [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] residence during his self-imposed exile. As with many [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] vehicles, no two were alike. The typical one was covered in an iridescent surface resembling fish scales. A typical submarine cost 18,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] new, or 7,000 used.

==Variant models==
[[File:LeastElegantCalamarianDesignEver-GoDV.jpg|thumb|left|The Calamarian minisub used to retrieve the glove of Darth Vader during the Trioculus affair]]
There were a variety of different models and sizes of submersible used by the Mon Calamari on Dac, such as the [[Calamarian minisub]] used by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Admiral Ackbar]] to locate the [[Glove of Darth Vader]] during the [[Trioculus affair]].<ref name="GoDV">''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]''</ref> Some variants of the class had two large grappling arms attached to the main body, while a military model also existed, which was equipped with a torpedo launcher.

A notable example was the ''[[Elfa]]'', which belonged to a [[Yarin]] harbormaster at [[Crystal Reef]]. It was used by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Cilghal]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen]], [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], [[Zekk]], and their companion [[Anja Gallandro]] to destroy a hidden stash of [[Andris/Legends|andris]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] beneath a polar ice cap on Dac in [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]].
